message: 🌱 Add argo: Please allow for defining dependency DAG (Directed Acyclic mission (#492)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-3517-please-allow-for-defining-dependency-dag-directed-acyclic-graph",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo: Please allow for defining dependency DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph)",
+    "description": "Please allow for defining dependency DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph). Requested by 132+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
helm list -n argo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get configmap -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo
```
When defining Application please allow a new field that is very similar to SyncWaves but allows for more fine-grained control of dependencies, thus allowing more parallelism."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Please allow for defining dependency DAG (Directed Acyclic",
+        "description": "PoC for #3517 - up for discussion. Things to note:

* Currently, manual syncing is also blocked when there are unmet dependencies
* Not a single test yet

Enables to specify dependencies between `Applications`:

```
dependsOn:
  - applicationName: otherApp
  - applicationName: someApp
```
```yaml
syncWaves:
    clusterBootstrap:
      namespaces:
        platformTopology: 0
        playgroundTopology: 0
      priorityClasses: 0
      storageClasses: 0
      sealedSecretsController: 10
      sealedSecrets: 20
      spotTerminationHandler: 10
    istio:
      controlPlane: 1000
      kiali: 1010
    infra:
      jaeger: 2000
      prometheus:
        operator: 2000
        alertRules: 2010
        grafanaDashboard: 2010
        thanos: 2010
      certManager: 2000
      argoCd: 2100
    operators:
      spark: 3000
      zookeeper: 3000
    knative:
      operat
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo
kubectl get events -n argo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Please allow for defining dependency DAG (Directed Acyclic" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "PoC for #3517 - up for discussion. Things to note:

* Currently, manual syncing is also blocked when there are unmet dependencies
* Not a single test yet

Enables to specify dependencies between `Applications`:

```
dependsOn:
  - applicationName: otherApp
  - applicationName: someApp
```",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "syncWaves:
    clusterBootstrap:
      namespaces:
        platformTopology: 0
        playgroundTopology: 0
      priorityClasses: 0
      storageClasses: 0
      sealedSecretsController: 10
      sealedSecrets: 20
      spotTerminationHandler: 10
    istio:
      controlPlane: 1000
      kiali: 1010
    infra:
      jaeger: 2000
      prometheus:
        operator: 2000
        alertRules: 2010
        grafanaDashboard: 2010
        thanos: 2010
      certManager: 2000
      argoCd: 2100
    operators:
      spark: 3000
      zookeeper: 3000
    knative:
      operator: 3000
      serving: 4000
      eventing: 4000
      source:
        config: 3000
        sqs: 4000
      kafka:
        zookeeper: 4000
    search:
      core:
        zookeeper: 5000
 ",
+        "dependsOn:
  - applicationName: otherApp
  - applicationName: someApp"
+      ]
+    }
